description: Catalog of fields a partner API key CAN be granted (the platform superset). The partner API (tatva_connect.api.partner) reads its catalog + routing FROM this table. Tick a subset per partner in CRM Lead API Mapping > Allowed Fields. Add a row here (+ the underlying doctype field) to expose a new partner field with no code change.

fields.label: Section
fields.description: Routing section, e.g. lead / plan / lab. Parent (lead) vs child sections.

fields.label: Target DocType
fields.description: DocType the field lives on, e.g. CRM Lead, CRM Lab Profile.

fields.label: Child Table Field
fields.description: For child sections only: the CRM Lead child-table fieldname this section writes into, e.g. custom_lab_profile. Blank for the parent (lead) section.

fields.label: Fieldname
fields.description: The fieldname on the target doctype.

fields.label: Is Row Key
fields.description: For a child section: mark the ONE field that is this child's natural row key (the upsert-by-key address). A child section with a row-key field is multi-row; one without is single-row. Replaces the old hardcoded CHILD_CONFIG.

fields.label: SQL Source
fields.description: Smart Views composer: where the column physically lives. parent/child = on CRM Lead (or its child table); task = a promoted CRM Task column (one of the 9); payload = a display-only JSON_EXTRACT off CRM Task.custom_activity_payload (not filterable/sortable). Blank rows are partner-API-only (ignored by the composer).

fields.label: Child DocType
fields.description: Smart Views: for sql_source child, the CRM Lead child DocType to LEFT JOIN, e.g. CRM Drug Program Profile.

fields.label: Child Pick
fields.description: Smart Views: how to flatten the child row. 'single' = one row (parent=name); 'latest_by:<field>' = newest row by that field.

fields.label: Filterable
fields.description: Smart Views: only filterable fields may reach a WHERE clause.

fields.label: Sortable
fields.description: Smart Views: only sortable fields may reach ORDER BY.

fields.label: Surface
fields.description: Smart Views display hint: worklist (column on the list) vs detail (drawer only).

fields.label: Applies To
fields.description: Smart Views scope: 'lead' for a lead-view field, or 'activity:<task_type>' for an activity-view field (e.g. activity:Order Punch Status). Blank = any base object.

name: CRM Lead API Field
